description_long: This is a robust, wooden storage box constructed from thick, dark brown planks arranged horizontally and reinforced with diagonal wooden slats on each face. The corners are secured with visible metal rivets, giving it a sturdy, reinforced appearance suitable for heavy-duty use. The wood grain texture is prominent, with a slightly weathered look, suggesting it is designed for outdoor or industrial environments. The box is cubic in shape, with no visible openings, handles, or labeling, and all sides appear identical except for minor wood grain variations. The top is flat and solid, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. Its overall design evokes classic shipping crates commonly found in urban storage areas, warehouses, or construction sites.
description: A sturdy, cubic wooden storage box with reinforced corners and diagonal slats, featuring a dark brown, weathered finish and no visible openings or handles.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat wooden face with diagonal slats and metal rivets at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with similar diagonal slats and rivets, minor wood grain differences.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same slat and rivet arrangement, consistent wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again matching the other faces, with diagonal slats and corner rivets.
